jsonLd.title: Miniklub is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
